sourcesContent:
import React from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import { useTranslation } from 'react-i18next'; function Footer() { const currentYear = new Date().getFullYear(); const { t } = useTranslation(); return (
{/* Logo and info */}

{t('footer.about')}

Facebook Twitter LinkedIn Instagram
{/* Quick Links */}

{t('footer.about')}

  • {t('header.about')}
  • {t('header.courses')}
  • {t('header.contact')}
{/* Legal */}

{t('footer.terms')}

  • {t('footer.privacy')}
  • {t('footer.terms')}
{/* Contact */}

{t('header.contact')}

  • contact@stratford.edu
  • +44 123 456 7890

© {currentYear} Stratford International University. {t('footer.allRightsReserved')}

); } export default Footer;
